name: @feed/testing
description: Shared testing utilities and test suites for Feed

scripts.lint: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/testing/package.json packages/testing/tsconfig.json packages/testing/tsconfig.typecheck.json packages/testing/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: cd ../.. && node ../../packages/scripts/rm-path-recursive.mjs packages/testing/node_modules/@playwright packages/testing/node_modules/playwright && bunx playwright test --config packages/testing/playwright.config.ts
scripts.lint:check: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/testing/package.json packages/testing/tsconfig.json packages/testing/tsconfig.typecheck.json packages/testing/playwright.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/testing/package.json packages/testing/tsconfig.json packages/testing/tsconfig.typecheck.json packages/testing/playwright.config.ts
scripts.format: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome format --write --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true packages/testing/package.json packages/testing/tsconfig.json packages/testing/tsconfig.typecheck.json packages/testing/playwright.config.ts
scripts.format:check: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome format --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true packages/testing/package.json packages/testing/tsconfig.json packages/testing/tsconfig.typecheck.json packages/testing/playwright.config.ts
